description: Reliance Jio launched in India in September 2016 with predatory pricing, offering free data and calls to disrupt the market. This led to massive public support for cheaper connectivity but significant backlash from incumbent telecom rivals.

key_events.description: Official launch of Jio 'Welcome Offer' providing free 4G data.
Incumbent telcos (Airtel/Vodafone) file complaints with TRAI regarding predatory pricing.
TRAI rules in favor of Jio's promotional offer extension.

calibration_notes: Demonstrates the tension between pro-consumer pricing and the regulatory perspective on market competition.
